title: Magical Crunchy Algerian Fideo Pasta
description: A rich and crunchy Algerian dish featuring fideo pasta, this recipe is a crowd-pleaser and can be served in a mason jar, perfect for a shojin-friendly meal
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Cook the fideo pasta according to package instructions and set aside
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the onion until translucent
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1-2 minutes
Add the vegetable broth, chickpeas, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a simmer
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 10-15 minutes
In a bain-marie, combine the cooked fideo pasta and the sauce from the skillet
Top with sliced almonds and chopped parsley
Transfer the mixture to a mason jar and bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the top is crunchy and golden brown
